ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lakes" (
  "lake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lake */,
  "lake_name" TEXT /* Name of the lake */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the lake */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the lake */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the lake */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the lake in square kilometers */,
  "depth" REAL /* Maximum depth of the lake in meters */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality of the lake */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey of the lake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the species information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developmental_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Start age of the stage in days */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* End age of the stage in days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the stage information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the year's data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_expressions" (
  "ge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic expression */,
  "ge_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic expression */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic expression */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* Gene sequence associated with the genetic expression */,
  "expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level of the genetic expression */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the genetic expression information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "lake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lake where the data point was collected */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species of the data point */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developmental stage of the data point */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data point was collected */,
  "ge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic expression of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the genetic expression */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was measured */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the data point */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_ge_id FOREIGN KEY ("ge_id") REFERENCES genetic_expressions ("ge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES developmental_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_lake_id FOREIGN KEY ("lake_id") REFERENCES lakes ("lake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "lake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lake the file belongs to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the file belongs to */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developmental stage the file belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES developmental_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_lake_id FOREIGN KEY ("lake_id") REFERENCES lakes ("lake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "lake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lake the readme file belongs to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the readme file belongs to */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developmental stage the readme file belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES developmental_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_lake_id FOREIGN KEY ("lake_id") REFERENCES lakes ("lake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "lake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lake being accessed */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being accessed */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developmental stage being accessed */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES developmental_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_lake_id FOREIGN KEY ("lake_id") REFERENCES lakes ("lake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "lake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lake the permission applies to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the permission applies to */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developmental stage the permission applies to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the permission applies to */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Read access permission */,
  "write" INTEGER /* Write access permission */,
  "delete" INTEGER /* Delete access permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_lake_id FOREIGN KEY ("lake_id") REFERENCES lakes ("lake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES developmental_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "lake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lake the collaboration applies to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the collaboration applies to */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developmental stage the collaboration applies to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the collaboration applies to */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES developmental_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_lake_id FOREIGN KEY ("lake_id") REFERENCES lakes ("lake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
